title: Making Decisions
knowledge_note: The Quran says 'think deeply' many times. An if/otherwise block is a computer thinking — it checks a condition and chooses the right path.
explanation: The keyword 'if' lets your program make decisions. If the condition is true, the first block runs. Otherwise, the second block runs.
starter_code:
remember age = 10
if age > 5:
    say "You can learn to code!"
otherwise:
    say "Almost ready!"
worked_example:
remember age = 10
if age > 5:
    say "You can learn to code!"
otherwise:
    say "Almost ready!"
challenge: Change age to different numbers and see what happens.
